flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Colorado College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($62.1k → $70.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Colorado College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($62.1k → $70.7k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Colorado College rose 14% between 2017 and 2020 ($16.0k → $18.3k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Colorado College fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (82.3% → 71.1%).
